title: Unstable
description: A port of Extra Utilities 1 Unstable Tools & Rituals to modern versions of minecraft.
body:
The original concept of this mod is part of the 1.7.10 version of [Extra Utilities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-utilities), created by RWTema.

This mod aims to take the Unstable Tools & both rituals (Activation & Pseudo Inversion), and port them to modern versions of minecraft.

Multiple parts of the mod are controlled by datapacks:
- Pseudo Inversion Chest Contents
- Pseudo Inversion Entity Data
- Reversing Hoe Transmutations
- Reversing Hoe Property Regression

For in-game documentation, install [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli).

For more information, check the [wiki](https://github.com/Electrolyte220/Unstable/wiki).
